description: HOMESERVER Caduceus lever with Keyman-backed private caduceus_staff access socket; legacy household helper is retirement-pending until Coronatio cutover.

managed_files.content:
{
  "schema": "caduceus.identity.v1",
  "device": "homeserver",
  "profile": "homeserver",
  "mode": "homeserver",
  "public_surface": true,
  "harmonia_profile": "/etc/harmonia/profiles/homeserver/index.json"
}

[Unit]
Description=Caduceus private Keyman access staff
Before=caduceus.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
Group=root
UMask=0077
RuntimeDirectory=caduceus
RuntimeDirectoryMode=0700
RuntimeDirectoryPreserve=yes
Environment=PYTHONPATH=/opt/keyman/runtime/lib:/usr/local/sbin
Environment=CADUCEUS_ACCESS_SOCKET=/run/caduceus/access.sock
ExecStartPre=/usr/bin/test -f /opt/keyman/runtime/lib/keyman_caduceus_access.py
ExecStartPre=/usr/bin/test -f /opt/keyman/runtime/lib/keyman_caduceus_access.runtime.json
ExecStartPre=/usr/bin/python3 /opt/keyman/runtime/lib/keyman_installer/index.py verify --runtime-dir /opt/keyman/runtime --key-dir /root/key --vault-dir /vault/.keys
ExecStart=/var/lib/caduceus/venv/bin/python3 -m caduceus_staff.access_server
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2
NoNewPrivileges=yes
PrivateTmp=yes
ProtectSystem=strict
ProtectHome=tmpfs
BindReadOnlyPaths=/opt/keyman/runtime/lib /root/key
ReadWritePaths=/run/caduceus /var/lib/caduceus /vault/.keys

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

[Unit]
Description=Caduceus HOMESERVER public appliance lever
After=network-online.target caduceus-access.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/caduceus serve
Environment=CADUCEUS_BIND=0.0.0.0:3014
Environment=CADUCEUS_ACCESS_SOCKET=/run/caduceus/access.sock
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2
ExecStartPre=+/usr/bin/systemd-tmpfiles --create /etc/tmpfiles.d/caduceus-hyalos.conf
ExecStartPre=+/usr/bin/systemd-tmpfiles --create /etc/tmpfiles.d/caduceus-access.conf
LogsDirectory=hyalos

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

# Private Caduceus staff socket directory.
d /run/caduceus 0700 root root -
z /run/caduceus 0700 root root -

# Caduceus owns the sole Hyalos structured channel.
# /var/log/caduceus is reserved for separate service-log concerns, not Hyalos authority.
d /var/log/hyalos 0755 caduceus caduceus -
f /var/log/hyalos/channel.jsonl 0644 caduceus caduceus -
z /var/log/hyalos 0755 caduceus caduceus -
z /var/log/hyalos/channel.jsonl 0644 caduceus caduceus -
"""Caduceus privileged staff actuators."""

# Household capability

This staff-only Python band maintains and signs short-lived household capability tokens. Public callers receive JSON tokens, status, and public-safe receipts; private signing material remains inside the staff actuator.

The ordered `skeleton-sha` child exposes only the SHA-256 identity digest of the fixed household skeleton key.

from .index import main

raise SystemExit(main())

# Skeleton SHA

Returns only the SHA-256 digest of the fixed household skeleton key. It accepts no path and exposes no key bytes.

from .index import main, skeleton_sha, skeleton_sha_receipt

__all__ = ["main", "skeleton_sha", "skeleton_sha_receipt"]

import sys
from .index import main

raise SystemExit(main(sys.argv[1:]))

caduceus_profile_source.append:
services:
  ledger: /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-ledger.jsonl
  update:
    timer: harmonia-homeserver.timer
    latest_receipt: /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-update-latest/run.json
  coronatio:
    latest_receipt: /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-activate-latest/modules/coronatio/run.json
  caduceus:
    latest_receipt: /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-activate-latest/modules/caduceus/run.json
harmonia_routes:
  update_now:
    bin: /usr/local/bin/harmonia
    args:
    - homeserver-update
    - /etc/harmonia/profiles/homeserver/index.json
    - --apply
    - --receipt-dir
    - /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-update-latest
  update_check:
    bin: /usr/local/bin/harmonia
    args:
    - homeserver-update
    - /etc/harmonia/profiles/homeserver/index.json
    - --receipt-dir
    - /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-update-latest
operator_aliases:
  update: caduceus update now
  update-check: caduceus update check
  update-status: caduceus update status
  receipts: caduceus receipts latest
  health: caduceus health
